questions.question: What is the main issue Paul addresses in this chapter?
options: Judging others over disputable matters like food and special days
questions.answer: Judging others over disputable matters like food and special days

questions.question: Paul says the kingdom of God is not eating and drinking but what?
options: Righteousness, peace, and joy in the Holy Spirit
questions.answer: Righteousness, peace, and joy in the Holy Spirit

questions.question: Paul says it is wrong to eat meat that has been offered to idols.
For none of us lives to himself, and none dies to _____.
So then each one of us will give an _____ of himself to God.
